description: Core Metric Library: Quantitative metrics for holotomography-based phenotype analysis in the PDD framework

metrics.name: Cell Volume
metrics.description: Total volume of a single cell calculated from 3D RI tomogram segmentation.
metrics.calculation_method: Voxel counting within cell boundary after RI-based segmentation

metrics.name: Nuclear Volume
metrics.description: Volume of the nucleus segmented from the 3D RI tomogram based on RI contrast with cytoplasm.
metrics.calculation_method: RI threshold-based nuclear segmentation; voxel counting

metrics.name: Mean Refractive Index
metrics.description: Average refractive index value within the cell or specific subcellular region.
metrics.calculation_method: Mean of all voxel RI values within the segmented region

metrics.name: RI Standard Deviation
metrics.description: Standard deviation of RI values within a cell, indicating intracellular heterogeneity.
metrics.calculation_method: Standard deviation of all voxel RI values within segmented cell region

metrics.name: Sphericity Index
metrics.description: Measure of how closely the cell shape approximates a sphere. Value of 1 = perfect sphere.
metrics.calculation_method: Ψ = (π^(1/3) × (6V)^(2/3)) / A, where V = volume, A = surface area

metrics.name: Nucleus-to-Cytoplasm RI Ratio
metrics.description: Ratio of mean nuclear RI to mean cytoplasmic RI, indicating relative molecular density distribution.
metrics.calculation_method: Mean RI (nucleus) / Mean RI (cytoplasm)

metrics.name: Surface Roughness
metrics.description: Measure of membrane irregularity from the 3D surface reconstruction of the cell.
metrics.calculation_method: RMS deviation of surface vertices from best-fit ellipsoid

metrics.name: Dry Mass
metrics.description: Total non-aqueous mass of the cell, directly proportional to integrated RI over cell volume.
metrics.calculation_method: m = (1/α) × ∫(n - n_medium) dV, where α = specific refractive increment (~0.18 mL/g for proteins)

metrics.name: Proliferation Index
metrics.description: Rate of cell population growth measured by cell counting over time.
metrics.calculation_method: Cell count at time T / Cell count at time 0; or linear regression of log(count) vs time

metrics.name: Dry Mass Growth Rate
metrics.description: Rate of change in cellular dry mass over time, a direct indicator of biomass accumulation.
metrics.calculation_method: ΔDry Mass / Δt between time points

metrics.name: Cell Height (Aspect Ratio)
metrics.description: Maximum cell height or height-to-projected-area ratio indicating cell spreading/flattening.
metrics.calculation_method: Maximum z-extent of cell segmentation; or Height / sqrt(Projected Area)

metrics.name: Migration Speed
metrics.description: Average velocity of cell center-of-mass displacement over time.
metrics.calculation_method: Total path length / Total observation time

metrics.name: Migration Directionality
metrics.description: Ratio of net displacement to total path length, indicating directed vs random migration.
metrics.calculation_method: Net displacement / Total path length

metrics.name: Intracellular Particle Count
metrics.description: Number of discrete high-RI or low-RI objects within the cytoplasm (vesicles, droplets, vacuoles).
metrics.calculation_method: Local extrema detection within cytoplasmic RI map; size and RI filtering

metrics.name: Cell Clustering Index
metrics.description: Measure of spatial aggregation in a cell population compared to random distribution.
metrics.calculation_method: Nearest-neighbor distance ratio: observed mean / expected mean for random distribution

metrics.name: Immune-Tumor Contact Ratio
metrics.description: Fraction of tumor cells in direct contact with immune cells in co-culture assays.
metrics.calculation_method: Number of tumor cells with immune cell contact / Total tumor cells

metrics.name: Cell Death Rate
metrics.description: Fraction of cells undergoing death (apoptotic or necrotic) in the observed population.
metrics.calculation_method: Morphological death event counting / Total cell count × 100

metrics.name: Selectivity Index
metrics.description: Ratio of drug effect on target cells vs non-target cells, measuring therapeutic window.
metrics.calculation_method: IC50 (non-target) / IC50 (target); or Death Rate (target) / Death Rate (non-target)

metrics.name: Vesicle Internalization Rate
metrics.description: Rate of new vesicle formation within the cell, tracking endocytic or autophagic activity.
metrics.calculation_method: ΔVesicle count / Δt per cell

metrics.name: Mitotic Index
metrics.description: Fraction of cells in mitosis at a given time point.
metrics.calculation_method: Number of cells in mitosis (identified by morphology) / Total cell count × 100

metrics.name: Lipid Droplet Area Fraction
metrics.description: Percentage of cytoplasmic area occupied by lipid droplets (high-RI spherical inclusions).
metrics.calculation_method: Total lipid droplet area / Cytoplasmic area × 100 (per z-slice or 3D volume fraction)

metrics.name: RI Texture Entropy
metrics.description: Shannon entropy of the RI distribution within a cell region, measuring structural complexity/disorder.
metrics.calculation_method: H = -Σ p(RI_i) × log2(p(RI_i)) from RI histogram bins
